title: DFU - Software Update Page - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to check DFU pop up
scenario: DFU fails with persistent "Update currently not available" pop-up when one earbud is disconnected during firmware update on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on the connected earbud device name to open Device Settings
Go to Device Settings → Software Update
During the update process, disconnect one earbud (e.g., place the right earbud in the charge case)
Reconnect the disconnected earbud (remove it from the charge case)
Observe whether the pop-up dismisses automatically
Repeat steps 1–10 for the left earbud disconnection
expected: The pop-up should dismiss automatically when the disconnected earbud is reconnected, allowing the update to resume or proceed without user intervention.
